channel.title: Quarto Blog
channel.description: Welcome to my blog! I am Connor Lockhart, and this is where I share my academic work, music reviews in a series called Synaptic Static, and other random thoughts. Visit my main website at [conair94.github.io](https://conair94.github.io).

item.title: Post With Code
item.dc:creator: Harlow Malloc
item.description: This is a post with executable code.

item.title: Initial Random Thoughts
item.dc:creator: Connor Lockhart
item.description: A space for miscellaneous thoughts and reflections. Still deciding on a final name for this category!

item.title: My First Academic Post
item.dc:creator: Connor Lockhart
item.description: This is a placeholder for my academic work. I’ll be sharing research findings and insights here.

item.title: Synaptic Static: Introduction
item.dc:creator: Connor Lockhart
item.description: Welcome to Synaptic Static, my series for music reviews. Stay tuned for my first review!

item.title: Welcome To My Blog
item.dc:creator: Tristan O'Malley
item.description:
This is the first post in a Quarto blog. Welcome!

Since this post doesn’t specify an explicit image, the first image in the post will be used in the listing page of posts.
